title: Laura Ashley 10-Piece Kitchen Utensils Set - Soft Grip Ceramic Handle Kitchen Tools & Gadgets Include Turners, Spoons, Ladle, Spaghetti Server, Can Opener, Garlic Press, Peeler & Ice Cream Scoop
features: Everyday Kitchen Essentials: Designed for daily cooking and prep that brings both function and style to every meal, this 10-piece kitchen utensils set includes a ladle, spaghetti server, turner, slotted turner, spoon, slotted spoon, can opener, garlic press, peeler, and ice cream scoop

Stylish Addition to Your Kitchen: The sleek, modern design of the Stainless Steel Laura Ashley kitchen tools & gadgets set complements a variety of kitchen styles, enhancing your kitchen decor and adding sophistication to your dining table

Comfortable Grip: The ergonomic handles of these sets are designed to provide a comfortable, non-slip grip, reducing hand strain and making it easier to serve generous portions, whether for casual family dinners or formal gatherings

Lightweight for Easy Handling: This utensil set is designed to be lightweight, making them easy to handle when preparing meals. Despite their durable and sturdy construction, they provide great comfort when serving and reduce hand fatigue

Durable Construction: Designed to withstand daily use while maintaining their stunning appearance, this premium stainless steel kitchen set promises years of reliable performance, making them a valuable addition to your kitchen utensils
